title: chrysanthemum senecionis
intro: Chrysanthemum senecionis, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or Hwangryong, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in Eastern medicine, particularly in Korea, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum senecionis have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and allergies, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum senecionis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in soups and other culinary dishes.
